title: John Costanza
content:
{{Top|rwp}} {{Otheruses|John}} {{Image|person}} {{Person |image= |name=John Costanza |birth=[[August 14]], [[1940s|1943]]
[[Wikipedia:Dover, New York|Dover, New York]] |death= |listedpronouns= |nationality=American |occupation= |companies= |website= }} '''John Costanza''' (born [[August 14]], [[1940s|1943]]) is a comic book illustrator and letterer. His ''[[Star Wars]]'' work includes the early issues of the [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'']] series and [[Star Wars Annual (1977) 1|''Star Wars Annual'' (1977) 1]]. His comics career started at [[Wikipedia:DC Comics|DC Comics]] as both an illustrator and letterer in the 1960s on such titles as [[Wikipedia:G.I. Combat|G.I. Combat]] and [[Wikipedia:House of Mystery|House of Mystery]]. In the 1970s Costanza began drawing comics based on [[Wikipedia:Warner Bros.|Warner Bros.]] cartoon characters for [[Wikipedia:Western Publishing|Western Publishing]] and later on for DC Comics, and in the 1980s he illustrated some of the titles in [[Marvel Comics|Marvel's]] [[Star Comics]] line. ==Star Wars bibliography== ===Letterer=== *[[Star Wars (1977) 8|''Star Wars'' (1977) 8]] *[[Star Wars (1977) 9|''Star Wars'' (1977) 9]] *[[Star Wars (1977) 10|''Star Wars'' (1977) 10]] *[[Star Wars (1977) 12|''Star Wars'' (1977) 12]] *[[Star Wars (1977) 15|''Star Wars'' (1977) 15]] *[[Star Wars (1977) 20|''Star Wars'' (1977) 20]] *[[Star Wars (1977) 21|''Star Wars'' (1977) 21]] *[[Star Wars (1977) 23|''Star Wars'' (1977) 23]] *[[Star Wars (1977) 26|''Star Wars'' (1977) 26]] *[[Star Wars (1977) 27|''Star Wars'' (1977) 27]] *[[Star Wars (1977) 28|''Star Wars'' (1977) 28]] *[[Star Wars (1977) 29|''Star Wars'' (1977) 29]] *[[Star Wars (1977) 32|''Star Wars'' (1977) 32]] *[[Star Wars (1977) 33|''Star Wars'' (1977) 33]] *[[Star Wars (1977) 35|''Star Wars'' (1977) 35]] *[[Star Wars (1977) 36|''Star Wars'' (1977) 36]] *[[Star Wars (1977) 37|''Star Wars'' (1977) 37]] *[[Star Wars (1977) 45|''Star Wars'' (1977) 45]] *[[Star Wars Annual (1977) 1|''Star Wars Annual'' (1977) 1]] *''[[Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... Volume 1: Doomworld]]'' *''[[Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... Volume 2: Dark Encounters]]'' *''[[Star Wars: A Long Time Ago...
